caption: A man with short dark hair and a groomed beard is recording in a studio with dark, ribbed acoustic foam panels in the background. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a black long-sleeved shirt over a grey undershirt. Positioned directly in front of him is a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expressions shift slightly. He begins by looking upward and to his left with a neutral expression, then shifts his gaze further to the side. In the subsequent moments, he looks forward and slightly down, and finally closes his eyes while maintaining a calm demeanor. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
